title: Find And Replace in String
titleCn: 字符串中的查找与替换

testcases.input: s = "abcd", indices = [0, 2], sources = ["a", "cd"], targets = ["eee", "ffff"] Output: "eeebffff" Explanation: "a" occurs at index 0 in s, so we replace it with "eee". "cd" occurs at index 2 in s, so we replace it with "ffff".
testcases.expectedOutput: "eeebffff" Explanation: "a" occurs at index 0 in s, so we replace it with "eee". "cd" occurs at index 2 in s, so we replace it with "ffff".

testcases.input: s = "abcd", indices = [0, 2], sources = ["ab","ec"], targets = ["eee","ffff"] Output: "eeecd" Explanation: "ab" occurs at index 0 in s, so we replace it with "eee". "ec" does not occur at index 2 in s, so we do nothing.
testcases.expectedOutput: "eeecd" Explanation: "ab" occurs at index 0 in s, so we replace it with "eee". "ec" does not occur at index 2 in s, so we do nothing.
